name: Aider
project_binding_recipe: Bind the working tree in HASP once. HASP may create neutral aliases internally, but day-to-day agent use should prefer named refs like @OPENAI_API_KEY.
approval_path: Prefer the wrapper or launcher path, then let hasp mcp auto-open the daemon-backed session and use project and secret windows for longer aider runs; hasp session grant-plaintext is the operator path when plaintext is explicitly required.
safe_inject_path: Use hasp run for command execution or hasp_inject through the generic tool path, preferably with named refs like @OPENAI_API_KEY instead of recalling secret_01 or revealing plaintext.
write_env_path: Use hasp write-env with explicit convenience grants for .env.local style files.
